title: Diversion risk: Raspberry Pi 4B found in Geran-2/3 (Shahed-136/238)
detail: GUR teardown confirmed Raspberry Pi 4B used as 'Borscht Tracker V3' in Geran-2/3 (Shahed-136/238). 40,000+ units reportedly diverted. Forge DB contains 'DroneEngage — Cloud-Connected MAVLink Companion Platform' using same silicon family — shared supply chain with verified diversion pipeline.
prediction: Gray market premium persists. DRAM-driven price hikes may slow diversion as cost-benefit shifts, but active procurement pipelines remain.

title: RPi 4B confirmed in Geran-2/3 'Borscht' tracker — 40,000+ units diverted
detail: GUR War & Sanctions portal and Ukrainian military intelligence confirmed Raspberry Pi 4B as the core of the 'Borscht Tracker V3' in Geran-2 (Shahed-136) and Geran-3 (Shahed-238) attack drones. Reports indicate 40,000+ units procured via gray market channels. RPi CEO Eben Upton acknowledged use in Russian drones and tightened end-use requirements for China sales. Cross-reference: RPi CM4 used by Freefly Astro (Blue UAS) and custom ArduPilot builds.
prediction: RPi gray market premium in China remains elevated (30-50% above MSRP). Active procurement pipeline confirmed by multiple intelligence sources.

title: RPi 5 confirmed in Molniya-2R reconnaissance drone
detail: GUR documented RPi 5 integrated alongside Chinese Mini PC F8 (rebranded as 'Raskat') running Windows 11 in the Molniya-2R reconnaissance UAV. The Molniya-2R is the recon variant of the kamikaze FPV drone, used for monitoring Ukrainian positions and strike adjustment. Confirms active, ongoing procurement of latest-gen RPi hardware despite tightened export controls.
prediction: RPi gray market premium in China remains elevated (30-50% above MSRP). Active procurement pipeline confirmed by multiple intelligence sources.

title: RPi tracker with mesh networking in Geran-5 jet drone
detail: Russia's Geran-5 (6m wingspan, jet-powered, 90kg warhead, 1000km range) uses a 12-channel Kometa satellite navigation system and a tracker based on RPi with 3G/4G modems. The Geran-5 also features XK-F358 mesh network modems enabling 'chain control' — multiple drones in a salvo maintaining comms. This represents escalation from simple GPS-guided to mesh-networked swarm capability, all built on commercially available SBCs.
prediction: RPi gray market premium in China remains elevated (30-50% above MSRP). Active procurement pipeline confirmed by multiple intelligence sources.

title: Geographic risk: Taiwan — high risk, critical to Blue UAS supply chain
detail: Taiwan: Cross-strait tensions. TSMC concentration. Single point of failure for all advanced chips. Critical components: Qualcomm QRB5165 (fab), TSMC node for Jetson, Ambarella SoCs. Affected Blue UAS platforms: All Jetson-based, All QRB5165-based, All Ambarella-based.
prediction: Any disruption in Taiwan cascades to Qualcomm QRB5165 (fab), TSMC node for Jetson supply for all Blue UAS programs.

sources.name: Geopolitical Risk Assessment
sources.description: Allied nation stability and supply chain concentration risk. Taiwan/TSMC, S.Korea/DRAM focus.
sources.validation: Based on published geopolitical analysis, TSMC concentration data, and DRAM market reports.

sources.name: Supply Chain Geographic Mapping
sources.description: Component origin tracking mapped to allied nation risk levels. Based on manufacturer HQ and fab locations.
sources.validation: Manufacturer data from Forge DB. Fab locations from public disclosures and industry reporting.

title: Cascade risk: NVIDIA Jetson Orin NX — 5 platforms, 4 programs, SINGLE SOURCE
detail: Dependency graph for NVIDIA Jetson Orin NX: Platforms: Skydio X10D, Shield AI V-BAT, Anduril Ghost-X, Neousys FLYC-300. Programs: Army SRR, USAF CCA, Replicator/DAWG, USSOCOM ISR. Upstream: TSMC (fab), Samsung/SK Hynix (DRAM), NVIDIA (design). Single source: YES — no drop-in replacement. Cascade score: 40 (platforms × programs × source risk). If NVIDIA Jetson Orin NX supply is disrupted, 4 government programs are directly impacted.
prediction: A NVIDIA Jetson Orin NX disruption cascades to 4 programs within 4-8 weeks of lead time extension.

Upstream: TSMC (fab), Qualcomm (design), Samsung (DRAM). Single source: YES — no drop-in replacement. Cascade score: 30 (platforms × programs × source risk). If Qualcomm QRB5165 supply is disrupted, 3 government programs are directly impacted.
prediction: A Qualcomm QRB5165 disruption cascades to 3 programs within 4-8 weeks of lead time extension.

title: TSMC is upstream of 2/6 critical components — master cascade node
detail: TSMC fabs the silicon for: NVIDIA Jetson Orin NX, Qualcomm QRB5165. A TSMC disruption (Taiwan scenario, earthquake, power grid) simultaneously impacts ALL Jetson, ALL QRB5165, and dependent platforms. No alternative foundry at these process nodes. This is the single highest-impact node in the entire Blue UAS supply chain dependency graph.
prediction: Diversification away from TSMC requires 3-5 year foundry qualification cycle. No near-term mitigation exists at scale.
